raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "StreetCode Academy has devoted itself to empowering communities of color with the mindset, skills, and access to technology since 2014.",
    "The organization has served more than 2,000 students of all ages in its in-person classes before the pandemic.",
    "StreetCode Academy expanded its remote learning programs and public and private partnerships during the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "StreetCode Academy's service tally now includes more than 5,500 people in the region and about 1,000 people nationally.",
    "The organization has provided 20,000 hours of free technology classes.",
    "StreetCode partnered with the Ravenswood City School District to provide 2,500 students with free tech support that included training and access to technology.",
    "StreetCode helped to secure laptops for hundreds of students to use free of charge.",
    "Courses like game design using Roblox help local youth prepare for jobs in the tech ecosystem of the region.",
    "StreetCode has supported both young students and retirees in launching new businesses."
  ]
}
```
